name: Andrew Jarson
cooked: I bought one too. Honestly, just can’t wait to try the stem playback combined with sync. Hopefully mine is functioning, nd in general it’s such a cool relic, and fun to watch future development. This will also kind of let me know if I should consider a TP-7/TX-6 for touring internationally. I use my MPC Live as a stem player and multisample module, but it is a little large to travel with, and I’m not willing to shell out that Field cash just yet
